name: Flaming Peaches with Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the hard sugar cubes.
2. Use either pure lemon extract or rum.
3. Soak the sugar cubes in a bit of lemon extract or rum while preparing the sauce for 15-20 minutes.
4. For the custard sauce, beat egg yolks (or use 2 whole eggs instead) over a double boiler. Mix in the 1/4 cup sugar, salt, and scalded milk (heat until tiny bubbles form around edges but do not boil). Cook over simmering water, stirring constantly, until the mixture coats a spoon. Cool quickly, blend in vanilla, and chill.
5. To prepare peaches, place cut side up in a baking dish and sprinkle brown sugar in the hollows of peach halves. Dot with margarine. Broil slowly until the sugar forms a crust.
6. Place a soaked sugar cube in each peach half. Light the cubes and bring to the table flaming. Serve with the chilled custard sauce.
